attributes.title: logstash-*
attributes.name: Logs by tiago
attributes.runtimeFieldMap: {"correlation.origin":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def appName = ''; if (doc.containsKey('application_name.keyword') && doc['application_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name.keyword'].value; } if (appName.length() > 0) { def m = /^(webserver-benchmark-[^;]+);req=([^;]+)(?:;(?:sid|s)=(.+))?$/.matcher(appName); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(1)); } }"}},"correlation.request_id":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def appName = ''; if (doc.containsKey('application_name.keyword') && doc['application_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name.keyword'].value; } if (appName.length() > 0) { def m = /^(webserver-benchmark-[^;]+);req=([^;]+)(?:;(?:sid|s)=(.+))?$/.matcher(appName); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(2)); } }"}},"correlation.session_id":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def appName = ''; if (doc.containsKey('application_name.keyword') && doc['application_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { appName = doc['application_name.keyword'].value; } if (appName.length() > 0) { def m = /^(webserver-benchmark-[^;]+);req=([^;]+)(?:;(?:sid|s)=(.+))?$/.matcher(appName); if (m.find() && m.group(3) != null) { emit(m.group(3)); } }"}},"sql.op":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('ps.keyword') && doc['ps.keyword'].size() > 0) { def ps = doc['ps.keyword'].value.toUpperCase(); if (ps.equals('SELECT') || ps.equals('INSERT') || ps.equals('UPDATE') || ps.equals('DELETE')) { emit(ps); } } if (doc.containsKey('message.keyword') && doc['message.keyword'].size() > 0) { def m = /(?i)\\b(SELECT|INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE)\\b/.matcher(doc['message.keyword'].value); if (m.find()) { emit(m.group(1).toUpperCase()); } }"}},"url_params.name":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('url_param_name.keyword') && doc['url_param_name.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['url_param_name.keyword'].value); } else if (doc.containsKey('url_params.keyword') && doc['url_params.keyword'].size() > 0) { def raw = doc['url_params.keyword'].value; def key = '\"name\":\"'; def start = raw.indexOf(key); if (start >= 0) { def from = start + key.length(); def end = raw.indexOf('\"', from); if (end > from) { emit(raw.substring(from, end)); } } }"}},"url_params.email":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('url_param_email.keyword') && doc['url_param_email.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['url_param_email.keyword'].value); } else if (doc.containsKey('url_params.keyword') && doc['url_params.keyword'].size() > 0) { def raw = doc['url_params.keyword'].value; def key = '\"email\":\"'; def start = raw.indexOf(key); if (start >= 0) { def from = start + key.length(); def end = raw.indexOf('\"', from); if (end > from) { emit(raw.substring(from, end)); } } }"}},"log_body":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"if (doc.containsKey('body.keyword') && doc['body.keyword'].size() > 0) { def b = doc['body.keyword'].value; if (b.length() > 0 && !b.equals('{}')) { emit(b); } else if (doc.containsKey('message.keyword') && doc['message.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['message.keyword'].value); } } else if (doc.containsKey('message.keyword') && doc['message.keyword'].size() > 0) { emit(doc['message.keyword'].value); }"}},"session_id_resolved":{"type":"keyword","script":{"source":"def sid = null; if (doc.containsKey('session_id.keyword') && doc['session_id.keyword'].size() > 0) { sid = doc['session_id.keyword'].value; } if (sid == null && doc.containsKey('headers.keyword') && doc['headers.keyword'].size() > 0) { def h = doc['headers.keyword'].value; def xsKey = '\"x-session-id\":\"'; def xsStart = h.indexOf(xsKey); if (xsStart >= 0) { def from = xsStart + xsKey.length(); def end = h.indexOf('\"', from); if (end > from) { sid = h.substring(from, end); } } if (sid == null) { def ckKey = 'webserver_benchmark_session='; def ckStart = h.indexOf(ckKey); if (ckStart >= 0) { def from = ckStart + ckKey.length(); def end = h.indexOf(';', from); sid = end > from ? h.substring(from, end) : h.substring(from); } } if (sid == null) { def baKey = '\"authorization\":\"Bearer '; def baStart = h.indexOf(baKey); if (baStart >= 0) { def from = baStart + baKey.length(); def end = h.indexOf('\"', from); if (end > from) { sid = h.substring(from, end); } } } } if (sid != null && sid.length() > 0) { emit(sid); }"}}}
attributes.fieldAttrs: {"url_params":{"customLabel":"Query string (?params)"},"body":{"customLabel":"body"},"url_param_name":{"customLabel":"Query: name"},"url_param_email":{"customLabel":"Query: email"},"url_params.name":{"customLabel":"Query: name (runtime)"},"url_params.email":{"customLabel":"Query: email (runtime)"},"log_timestamp":{"customLabel":"App log time (raw)"},"log_body":{"customLabel":"Body or message (runtime)"}}

attributes.title: Logs by tiago
attributes.description: All logs in logstash-* with default correlation columns.

attributes.title: Kafka — broker logs
attributes.description: Apache Kafka broker JSON logs (service webserver-benchmark-kafka). Topic create/consumer group join, controller events, etc.

attributes.title: Kafka — app publish & consume
attributes.description: Java/Rust publishers and Java/Python/Rust consumers for create-user and create-item. Filter by request_id to correlate with HTTP and Postgres.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"(service: (webserver-benchmark-java or webserver-benchmark-python or webserver-benchmark-rust)) and (kafka_event: * or message: (*Kafka* or *create-user* or *create-item* or *kafka message* or *create_user_consumer* or *create_item_consumer*) or controller: (*Kafka* or create_user_consumer or create_item_consumer or CreateUserEvent* or CreateItemEvent*))","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: Kafka — correlate by request_id
attributes.description: Paste a request_id in the query bar, e.g. request_id: \"your-uuid\" — shows Java publish, Python/Rust consume, and related Postgres lines for one dashboard action.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"_exists_: request_id and (kafka_event: * or service: webserver-benchmark-kafka or controller: (*Kafka* or create_item_consumer or create_user_consumer) or message: (*create-user* or *create-item* or *Kafka*))","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: WebServer BenchMark — Kafka logs
attributes.description: Broker logs (webserver-benchmark-kafka) plus Java/Python/Rust publish and consume lines. Use the bottom panel and filter request_id to stack-trace one dashboard Kafka action.
